commit.message:
refactor(validate): simplify Flux substitution to defaults + env vars + placeholders (#3480)

* refactor(validate): simplify Flux substitution to defaults + env vars

Remove ConfigMap/Secret parsing infrastructure from workload validate.
The validate command only needs schema-valid YAML — not runtime-accurate
values. Flux's ${VAR:=default} syntax already provides valid defaults.

Changes:
- Delete struct types: fluxSubstituteSourceRef, fluxKustomizationManifest,
  variableResourceManifest, validationSubstitutions, substituteSourceSet
- Delete functions: loadValidationSubstitutions, collectFluxSubstituteSources,
  collectFluxSubstituteSourcesFromFile, collectSubstitutionValuesFromFile,
  readYAMLDocuments, decodeSecretValue, applyValidationSubstitutions
- Add expandFluxSubstitutions using envvar.ExpandBytesWithLookup with
  os.LookupEnv fallback (unknown vars treated as unset so defaults apply)
- Remove substitutions parameter from entire call chain
- Remove unused imports: bufio, bytes, encoding/base64, utilyaml, yaml
- Rename test to TestValidateCmdSubstitutesFluxPostBuildVariablesWithDefaults

Reduces validate.go from 855 to 596 lines (-259 lines).

* Update pkg/cli/cmd/workload/validate_test.go

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Nikolai Emil Damm <ned@devantler.tech>

* Update pkg/cli/cmd/workload/validate.go

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Nikolai Emil Damm <ned@devantler.tech>

* feat(validate): type-aware placeholder substitution using JSON schemas

Replace the envvar-based Flux variable expansion with a type-aware
approach that uses JSON schemas to determine field types:

- Bare ${VAR}: looks up the schema type for the field path and
  substitutes a typed placeholder ("placeholder" for strings,
  0 for integers, true for booleans)
- ${VAR:=default} / ${VAR:-default}: parses the default value
  according to the schema type (e.g. "3" → int 3 for integer fields)
- Mixed text (e.g. whoami.${domain}): substitutes "placeholder"
  in string context

Schemas are fetched from yannh/kubernetes-json-schema for core
resources and datreeio/CRDs-catalog for CRDs, with disk caching.

This resolves the 26 validation failures when running against the
platform manifests (bare ${VAR} references previously expanded to
empty strings, producing invalid YAML).

* fix(validate): address review feedback for expansion logic

- Use YAML-aware document splitting via NewYAMLReader
- Handle list/array root YAML documents in expandDocument
- Trim whitespace in parseTypedDefault before parsing
- Remove network schema fetching (disk cache only)
- Add env var lookup support with os.LookupEnv
- Add YAML-native type inference for unknown schema types
- Add test for env var override of defaults
- Fix all golangci-lint issues

commit.message:
feat: Phase 4 — Atmosphere, Climate & Weather

- Add ClimateEngine: 3-cell circulation (Hadley/Ferrel/Polar), solar insolation,
  Milankovitch eccentricity forcing, greenhouse gas forcing, lapse rate altitude
  correction, ice-albedo feedback, Snowball Earth detection.
  Updates temperatureMap, windUMap, windVMap each tick.

- Add WeatherEngine: frontal precipitation at polar front and ITCZ, stochastic
  mid-latitude cyclones, tropical cyclone genesis (SST > 26°C, 5-20° lat),
  orographic precipitation (windward x2, leeward x0.5), cloud type assignment.
  Updates precipitationMap, cloudTypeMap, cloudCoverMap.

- Add AtmosphereEngine orchestrator: climate -> weather pipeline, sub-tick batching
  (default 1.0 Ma), emits CLIMATE_UPDATE, TROPICAL_CYCLONE_FORMED, ICE_AGE_ONSET,
  ICE_AGE_END, SNOWBALL_EARTH events. Exposes getClimateEngine/getWeatherEngine.

- Update shared/types.ts: add CLIMATE_UPDATE, TROPICAL_CYCLONE_FORMED, SNOWBALL_EARTH
  to GeoEventType; add payload interfaces and GeoEventPayloadMap entries.

- Update main.ts: wire AtmosphereEngine after SurfaceEngine in render loop.

- Update globe-renderer.ts: add biomeColor() Whittaker 12-biome classifier,
  updateClimateMap() builds RGBA biome overlay from temperature/precipitation.

- Add 37 unit tests across 3 new test files (climate, weather, atmosphere).
- Add 3 Playwright tests to e2e/app-shell.spec.ts.
- Update status.md: mark Phase 4 complete.

commit.message:
v5.10.0 (#102)

* ## v5.10.0
- *Enhancement:* `TestSharedState` updated to enable request-based (isolated) state; with the corresponding `GetHttpRequestId()` method now made public.
- *Enhancement:* Added `ApiTesterBase.AddPreRunAction()`, `AddPostRunBeforeExpectationsAction()`, `AddPostRunAfterExpectationsAction()` and `AddPostRunAction()` to enable the addition of actions to be executed at different stages of the `Run`/`RunAsync` process for every underlying test. This will enable the addition of common pre/post processing logic without having to explicitly add to each test.
- *Enhancement:* `TEntryPoint` methods can now be specified as `static`.
- *Enhancement:* `ApiError` added implicit conversion from (`string?`, `string`) tuple to enable simplified usage; e.g. `AssertErrors(("field", "Bad Request"))` versus `AssertErrors(new ApiError("field", "Bad Request"))`.
- *Fixed:* Reset `MockHttpClientRequest` internal state when using any `With*` method to ensure correct behavior.

* Update src/UnitTestEx/Hosting/EntryPoint.cs
